description: The unique identifier for a specific hotel property.
name: property_code

description: The name of the hotel property.
name: property_name

description: The specific date for which the data is recorded.
name: stay_date

description: Information about special events occurring on the stay date.
name: special_events

description: Information about special events occurring on the same stay date in the previous year.
name: special_events_ly

description: The number of rooms available for booking on the stay date.
name: available_rooms

description: The number of rooms available for booking on the same stay date in the previous year.
name: available_rooms_ly

description: The total projected demand for rooms on the stay date.
name: total_demand_total

description: The actual total demand for rooms on the same stay date in the previous year.
name: total_demand_total_ly_actual

description: The projected demand for rooms from group bookings on the stay date.
name: total_demand_group

description: The actual demand for rooms from group bookings on the same stay date in the previous year.
name: total_demand_group_ly_actual

description: The projected demand for rooms from transient (individual) bookings on the stay date.
name: total_demand_transient

description: The actual demand for rooms from transient (individual) bookings on the same stay date in the previous year.
name: total_demand_transient_ly_actual

description: The Last Room Value, representing the estimated revenue for the last room sold.
name: lrv

description: The percentage of bookings that are expected to cancel or no-show.
name: wash_pct

description: The actual percentage of bookings that cancelled or no-showed on the same stay date in the previous year.
name: wash_pct_ly_actual

description: The Best Available Rate for rooms on the stay date.
name: bar_price

description: The date when this data snapshot was taken.
name: snapshot_date
